## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test or tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested the change locally where applicable.
- [ ] I have updated documentation where behavior or configuration changed.
- [ ] I have not committed secrets, credentials, generated lockfiles, or local environment files.
- [ ] I understand NodEW-api is in early-stage development and breaking changes may happen without prior notice.

## Notes

Add migration notes, screenshots, API examples, or follow-up work if needed.
